_meta.resume_note: Official-negative-evidence review complete for Lassen's 2025-2026 full catalog and Addendum 1. No general Biology/Biological Sciences AS-T, AS, or AA is published; the addendum's Biology Chemistry award is a certificate only.

none_found_sources.locator: Complete 2025-2026 catalog degree-program section, printed pages 45-96: no Biology/Biological Sciences AS-T, AS, or AA; closest broad awards are University Studies/General Studies emphases in Natural Science and Allied Health.
2025-2026 Catalog Addendum 1, printed page 20: the new Biology Chemistry award is a 16-18 unit Certificate of Achievement, not an AS-T, AS, or AA.

notes: Human-review note: an official catalog index entry appears to point to a Biology program degree, but the cited page is unrelated and the full program section contains no qualifying general Biology/Biological Sciences associate degree. The complete catalog and official addendum were checked together; certificates and broad Natural Science/Allied Health emphases are excluded by scope.
